title: Implement overlay reconcile --prune to drop converged speculative fields
description: Add overlay reconcile command that removes speculative override fields once base issue data converges, and deletes empty overlay records.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Implemented overlay reconcile with prune semantics and CLI command surface. Evidence: added , field-prune logic, resolve-path override merging, and Rust/Python overlay tests passing. Next: finalize hook wiring and docs, then close dependent tasks. Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Finalized reconcile command implementation with field-prune behavior. Evidence: command overlay reconcile complete (projects=1, scanned=0, updated=0, removed=0, pruned=0) returns aggregate stats; Rust tests include reconcile prune/remove + override-merge coverage. Next: monitor real pull/rebase flows for prune effectiveness. Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Finalized reconcile command implementation with field-prune behavior.
Evidence: Command kbs overlay reconcile all prune dry-run returns aggregate stats; Rust tests cover prune/remove and override-merge behavior.
Next: Monitor real pull and rebase flows for prune effectiveness.
Risk/Blocker: none.
